title: Messi is about to play England for the first time ...
summary: In a historic first, Lionel Messi will face England in Wednesday's 2026 World Cup semifinal despite never having played against them in his career. This unique matchup highlights a remarkable gap in one of soccer's greatest player's resume. The semifinal will be a significant moment given the star power on both sides.
content: Until Wednesday's second semifinal of the 2026 World Cup kicks off, it's a strange historical quirk that Lionel Messi has never played against England.

zh.title: 梅西即将首次对阵英格兰
zh.summary: 在历史性的首次中，莱昂内尔·梅西将在周三的2026年世界杯半决赛中对阵英格兰队，尽管他职业生涯中从未与他们交过手。这场独特的对阵凸显了足球伟大球员职业生涯中的一个显著空白。考虑到双方的明星球员，半决赛将是一个重要时刻。

title: Projecting the USMNT 2030 World Cup roster: 30 pla...
summary: As the USMNT exits the 2026 World Cup, attention has already shifted to projecting the roster for 2030. The article examines which players could potentially represent the U.S. in four years. This forward-looking analysis helps understand the federation's long-term player development strategy.
content: The tears are barely dry from the USMNT's 2026 World Cup exit, but the page immediately turns to the 2030 World Cup. Here's who could represent the U.S. in four years.

zh.title: 预测美国足球队2030年世界杯阵容：30位球员...
zh.summary: 随着美国足球队退出2026年世界杯，人们的注意力已经转向2030年阵容的预测。该文章研究了哪些球员可能在四年后代表美国。这种前瞻性分析有助于理解足联的长期球员发展战略。

title: The USMNT's struggles at the World Cup can't be fi...
summary: Despite widespread criticism of USMNT's World Cup performance, the article suggests the team may actually be progressing but facing bad luck rather than fundamental problems. This contrarian perspective challenges the narrative that the U.S. soccer program is broken. The analysis raises questions about how we measure team success and development.
content: Everyone thinks they can fix the USMNT. But maybe the U.S. is actually making progress and luck just hasn't been on its side -- what then?

zh.title: 美国足球队在世界杯上的困难并非失败
zh.summary: 尽管对美国足球队世界杯表现的广泛批评，该文章暗示该队实际上可能在进步，但面临运气不佳而非根本性问题。这种反对的观点挑战了美国足球项目已破裂的叙述。分析提出了关于如何衡量球队成功和发展的问题。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Chelsea, Spurs e...
summary: Liverpool, Chelsea, and Tottenham are competing for Benfica winger Andreas Schjelderup in the current transfer window. The interest from three top Premier League clubs indicates the young talent's high market value. This transfer activity showcases the ongoing competition for emerging talent across Europe's top leagues.
content: Liverpool, Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur are interested in Benfica winger Andreas Schjelderup. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传言和新闻：利物浦、切尔西、热刺争夺舍尔德鲁普
zh.summary: 利物浦、切尔西和热刺正在争夺本菲卡边锋安德烈亚斯·舍尔德鲁普。三家英超顶级俱乐部的兴趣表明了这位年轻天才的高市场价值。这一转会活动展示了欧洲顶级联赛中对新兴人才的持续竞争。

title: France counterattack, Argentina set pieces: How Wo...
summary: As the World Cup reaches the semifinals, the four remaining top-ranked teams employ distinct attacking philosophies, from France's counterattacking style to Argentina's set-piece strategies. Understanding these tactical differences is crucial to predicting the outcomes of the final matches. The analysis reveals how tactical diversity exists even among the tournament's elite teams.
content: We're down to the final four of the World Cup, with the four top-ranked teams set to square off. Yet all of them use very different attacking styles in order to score goals; let's break it down.

zh.title: 法国反击、阿根廷定位球：世界杯半决赛的进攻战术分析
zh.summary: 随着世界杯进入半决赛，四支顶级球队采用不同的进攻哲学，从法国的反击风格到阿根廷的定位球策略。理解这些战术差异对于预测最终比赛的结果至关重要。分析揭示了即使在锦标赛的精英球队中也存在战术多样性。

title: France boss: Spain favorites for 'spectacular' sem...
summary: France coach Didier Deschamps deflected questions about his team's World Cup favorite status while predicting a spectacular semifinal matchup against Spain. Deschamps' comments suggest he respects Spain's credentials and believes the match will be entertaining. His strategic deflection of favorite status could be tactical positioning before the crucial game.
content: France head coach Didier Deschamps deflected questions about his team's World Cup favorite status and projected a "spectacular game" against Spain in Tuesday's semifinal.

zh.title: 法国主帅：西班牙是"精彩"半决赛的热门球队
zh.summary: 法国教练迪迪埃·德尚在规避关于他的球队世界杯热门地位的问题时，预测了与西班牙的精彩半决赛对阵。德尚的评论表明他尊重西班牙的实力，并相信比赛将非常精彩。他对热门地位的战略规避可能是在关键比赛前的战术定位。

title: World Cup Daily live: Happy Birthday to Lamine Yam...
summary: ESPN's World Cup Daily coverage celebrates the four semifinalists with a focus on star players like Lamine Yamal and comprehensive coverage of the competition. The feature provides analysis, video content, and background on the remaining teams as they advance to the crucial semifinals. This comprehensive coverage helps fans understand the storylines of the final matches.
content: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition as we now know our four World Cup semifinalists.

zh.title: 世界杯每日直播：祝拉米内·亚马尔生日快乐...
zh.summary: ESPN的世界杯每日报道庆祝四支半决赛球队，重点关注拉米内·亚马尔等明星球员及赛事的全面覆盖。该栏目提供分析、视频内容和关于球队的背景信息，帮助球队晋级至关键的半决赛阶段。这种全面的报道帮助球迷了解最终比赛的故事线。

title: Inside Spain's World Cup camp: Can good vibes coul...
summary: Spain has developed a strong team mentality and camaraderie in their World Cup camp as they prepare to face France in the semifinals. The team's "all for one" approach is being positioned as a potential advantage against France's star-studded roster. This focus on team unity reflects a strategic philosophy that emphasizes collective strength over individual brilliance.
content: As they prepare to face France's four musketeers, Spain have built their own powerful "all for one" mentality together in their World Cup summer camp.

zh.title: 走进西班牙世界杯营地：良好的氛围能否助力...
zh.summary: 西班牙在世界杯营地建立了强大的团队心态和战友情谊，为半决赛对阵法国做准备。球队的"一心一意"方式被定位为对抗法国明星球员阵容的潜在优势。这种对团队团结的关注反映了强调集体力量而非个人才华的战略哲学。

title: What's it really like to face Yamal and Mbappé? We...
summary: ESPN gathered insights from LaLiga players and coaches about the challenge of facing two of the tournament's most dominant talents, Lamine Yamal and Kylian Mbappé, who meet in Tuesday's semifinal. These firsthand perspectives reveal the tactical difficulties and physical demands of defending against such elite attackers. The article provides valuable context for understanding the France-Spain semifinal matchup.
content: ESPN has asked LaLiga players and coaches what it's like to take on Lamine Yamal and Kylian Mbappé, who will clash in Tuesday's World Cup semifinal.

zh.title: 面对亚马尔和姆巴佩真的是什么样的？我们...
zh.summary: ESPN收集了来自西甲球员和教练的见解，他们讲述了面对两名赛事最具主导力的天才的挑战，拉米内·亚马尔和基利安·姆巴佩将在周二的半决赛中相遇。这些第一手的观点揭示了防守此类精英射手的战术难度和身体要求。这篇文章为理解法国与西班牙半决赛提供了宝贵的背景。

title: Preparing for penalties: How goalkeepers get ready...
summary: The article examines how goalkeepers prepare for penalty shootouts, a skill that has decided 39 World Cup knockout matches since 1982. Penalty preparation involves both psychological training and technical analysis of opposing players' tendencies. This detailed look at goalkeeper readiness highlights a critical but often overlooked aspect of high-stakes tournament play.
content: Since the shootout debuted at the 1982 World Cup, 39 knockout games have been decided from the penalty spot. What does preparation look like for the goalkeepers?

zh.title: 为点球做准备：门神如何备战
zh.summary: 本文探讨了门神如何为点球大战做准备，这项技能在1982年以来决定了39场世界杯淘汰赛。点球准备涉及心理训练和对对方球员倾向的技术分析。这篇详细分析突出了门神备战在高风险锦标赛中一个至关重要但经常被忽视的方面。

title: Copy of Copy of Hate extra time and penalties? One man is on a mis...
summary: The article critiques soccer's current system of extra time and penalties for tied matches, arguing it's flawed and exploring potential alternatives. The discussion centers on whether the current format is the best way to decide cup competitions. This analysis addresses a long-standing debate among soccer fans and professionals about resolving drawn matches.
content: Soccer's format for deciding cup games that end in a tie is a flawed system. So what is an alternative?

zh.title: 厌烦加时赛和点球？一个人正在推行一项新使命
zh.summary: 本文批评了足球比赛中加时赛和点球的现有制度，认为其存在缺陷并探索潜在的替代方案。讨论集中在现行格式是否是决定杯赛胜负的最佳方式。这一分析涉及足球迷和专业人士之间关于如何解决平局的长期争论。

title: Sources: United in advanced talks for Tielemans
summary: Manchester United is pursuing midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa in advanced transfer negotiations. The deal represents United's ambition to strengthen their midfield with a proven Premier League performer. This transfer activity reflects United's strategy to compete for major trophies in the upcoming season.
content: Manchester United are in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：曼联与蒂莱曼斯进行高级谈判
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队正在与阿斯顿维拉进行高级转会谈判，争取签下中场球员尤里·蒂莱曼斯。这笔交易代表了曼联通过引进经验丰富的英超球员来加强中场的雄心。这项转会活动反映了曼联在即将到来的赛季中竞争重大奖杯的战略。

title: Haaland, Norway return home to heroes' welcome
summary: Erling Haaland and the Norwegian national team received a heroes' welcome from thousands of fans following their impressive World Cup performances in North America. The reception highlights the significance of their tournament achievements and the connection between players and their home nation. This celebration reflects Norway's soccer culture and pride in their players' accomplishments.
content: Erling Haaland and his Norway teammates were welcomed home by a crowd of thousands following their historic World Cup achievements in North America.

zh.title: 哈兰德与挪威球队返回家乡获英雄式欢迎
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德和挪威国家队在北美世界杯比赛表现出色后，获得了数千名球迷的英雄式欢迎。这次接待突显了他们的锦标赛成就的重要性以及球员与祖国之间的联系。这一庆祝活动反映了挪威足球文化以及人们对球员成就的自豪感。

title: Kane rejects England 'division,' backs Bellingham
summary: England captain Harry Kane has rejected speculation about squad divisions and emphasized complete unity before the World Cup semifinal against Argentina. Kane's statement addresses concerns about potential dressing room tensions that could affect team performance. The emphasis on togetherness is crucial messaging as England prepares for a high-pressure knockout match.
content: Captain Harry Kane has dismissed the idea of division in the England squad, insisting there is "complete togetherness" ahead of the World Cup semifinal with Argentina.

zh.title: 凯恩驳斥英格兰'分裂'传言，支持贝林汉姆
zh.summary: 英格兰队长哈里·凯恩驳斥了关于球队分裂的传言，并在与阿根廷进行世界杯半决赛前强调了完全的团结。凯恩的声明解决了对可能影响球队表现的更衣室紧张局势的担忧。在英格兰为高压淘汰赛做准备时，强调团结的信息至关重要。

title: Revs re-sign USMNT's Turner on loan from Lyon
summary: The New England Revolution has extended goalkeeper Matt Turner's loan from Lyon through the end of 2026, bringing the USMNT player back to MLS for additional playing time. The extended deal allows Turner to gain domestic minutes while maintaining his development in a competitive league. This loan arrangement balances Turner's need for regular matches with his continued growth as an international goalkeeper.
content: The New England Revolution announced on Monday that it has extended the loan of United States men's national team goalkeeper Matt Turner from Ligue 1 side Lyon through the end of 2026.

zh.title: 新英格兰革命队从里昂续签USMNT门将特纳
zh.summary: 新英格兰革命队将门将马特·特纳从里昂的租借延长至2026年底，使这名USMNT球员回到美职联获得更多出场时间。这份延期协议使特纳能够获得国内比赛时间，同时继续在竞争激烈的联赛中发展。这种租借安排平衡了特纳对定期比赛的需求与他作为国际门将的持续成长。

title: Deschamps predicts 'spectacular' France v Spain semi-final
summary: France manager Didier Deschamps predicts a 'spectacular' World Cup semi-final against Spain, with both teams featuring attacking talent. The match will be played in Dallas.
content: France boss Didier Deschamps is predicting a "spectacular" semi-final when his exciting side take on Spain in a heavyweight World Cup showdown in Dallas.

zh.title: 德尚预测法国对西班牙半决赛将"壮观"
zh.summary: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚预测与西班牙的世界杯半决赛将"壮观"，两支球队都具有进攻天赋。比赛将在达拉斯进行。
